use_cases: Pre-launch waitlist email collection for SaaS products
Building anticipation for product releases with countdown timers
Capturing leads with animated 3D visual experiences
Launching new digital products or services
Creating visual waitlist pages for indie developers
ai_summary: A visually striking waitlist landing page featuring an animated 3D background with flowing tubes rendered via Three.js, combined with a live countdown timer and email capture form. Light theme aesthetic with smooth continuous animations creates an engaging pre-launch experience ideal for collecting early user signups and building anticipation for product launches.
